Blog

Notes on math, data, and whatever else catches my eye.

  • June 18, 2026 The Price Is Watching You

    In 1985, four things decided the price of a plane ticket. In 2026, it's hundreds — and many of them are about you. An interactive look at surveillance pricing.

  • May 14, 2026 Hello, world.

    Starting a blog feels like buying a new notebook — half the value is the blank page in front of you, and half is the quiet promise that you’ll show up to fill it.
